documents.label: A copy of the minor's birth certificate
A copy of your birth certificate
A court order
Foster care certification
A copy of your driver's license or other government-issued identification
A lawfully executed and valid power of attorney
A copy of the minor's Social Security card
A copy of your Social Security card

authority.notes: Listed under 'To show you are the minor's parent or authorized representative' — any one of these four options is sufficient.

parentId.notes: Listed under 'For proof of your identity' with 'provide one from each category' — the three bullets within this category are OR options; pick one.

address.notes: The form does not list a separate proof-of-address document category. The guardian's current address is collected on the form itself.

childId.notes: The form explicitly states 'please provide BOTH of the following' for the minor's documents, requiring both the Social Security card and birth certificate.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Proof of guardianship (if not named on child's birth certificate)
Driver's license or another government issued identification card (e.g. state ID card)
Child's Social Security card
Proof of address (bank statement, utility bill, or insurance statement)

authority.notes: The child's birth certificate establishes parentage/authority if the parent is named on it. A separate proof of guardianship is required only if the parent is NOT named on the birth certificate — so these two together cover all authority cases, but only one will typically apply.

childId.notes: The page lists both 'a copy of your child's birth certificate' and 'a copy of your child's Social Security card' as required items in the same checklist with no indication that either is optional or an alternative for the other. Both appear to be required.

mailingAddress.notes: The page lists two addresses: standard mail (PO Box 9554) and overnight mail (701 Experian Parkway). The standard mail address is the primary mailing address for this request.

documents.label: Child's birth certificate
Court order or legal guardianship document
Foster care placement document
Parent's government-issued ID
Power of attorney
Child's Social Security card
Parent's Social Security card
Utility bill or proof of address
